ParamsTest.test_errorc
skipped (Python 3 only)a8
            class Root:
                @cherrypy.expose
                @cherrypy.tools.params()
                def resource(self, limit: int):
                    return type(limit).__name__
            conf = {'/': {'tools.params.on': True}}
            cherrypy.tree.mount(Root(), config=conf)
            r
